geom: band 0% (top/high) to 100% (bottom/low), Equilibrium at 50% dashed; Premium=upper green half, Discount=lower red half
label: Premium / Equilibrium / Discount
birth: schematic: dealing-range split at 50% fib EQ; sell in premium, buy in discount
notes: Equiti ICT premium/discount teaching diagram; percent axis, no prices, no stock — recognition-only reference, NO edge

geom: Equilibrium dashed mid; PREMIUM above, DISCOUNT below
label: PREMIUM / Equilibrium / DISCOUNT
birth: schematic: dealing range EQ split
notes: @i_am_the_algo 'PREMIUM TO DISCOUNT' — bearish leg from premium down to sellside; educational, no stock

geom: line at dealing-range double-top high
label: BSL
birth: schematic: buystops above equal/double highs
notes: buyside liquidity line over the M-top; schematic

geom: line at interim swing low
label: SSL
birth: schematic: sellstops below swing low
notes: sellside liquidity line; schematic

geom: labeled at dealing-range low (bottom of down leg)
label: Sellside Liquidity (sellstops)
birth: schematic: draw-on-liquidity target below range low
notes: terminal sellside target of the short; schematic

geom: pivot at top of M-structure
label: Dealing Range High
birth: schematic: range extreme high
notes: upper anchor of dealing range; schematic

geom: pivot at bottom of down leg
label: Dealing Range Low
birth: schematic: range extreme low
notes: lower anchor of dealing range; schematic

geom: small red box in premium near 'bsl' mid-label
label: bsl / premium supply box
birth: schematic: supply array in premium tapped before markdown
notes: red premium reaction box where the short originates; schematic

geom: green vertical dashed line labeled TIME
label: TIME
birth: schematic: killzone/time element gating the delivery
notes: vertical TIME line = time component of price delivery; schematic

geom: shaded range box; Equilibrium (fair value) dashed mid; Premium(expensive) above, Discount(cheap) below
label: PREMIUM (EXPENSIVE) / EQUILIBRIUM (FAIR VALUE) / DISCOUNT (CHEAP)
birth: schematic: 1.identify leg/range 2.fib 50% EQ 3.buy discount/sell premium
notes: Uhas/PhotonTrading premium-discount guide; no stock

geom: label 'BOS' at initial swing break, lower-left
label: BOS
birth: schematic: break of structure continues trend
notes: leftmost BOS mark; schematic

geom: label 'BOS' near swing high before markup
label: BOS
birth: schematic: BOS confirming bullish continuation into premium
notes: upper BOS mark; schematic

geom: 'CHoCH' labels clustered in premium half
label: Bullish CHoCH is premium — False signal (HL has formed)
birth: schematic: CHoCH forming in premium = lower-probability/false
notes: teaching point: premium CHoCH unreliable; schematic (cluster of ~3 CHoCH labels here)

geom: 'CHoCH' label in discount half near EQ underside
label: Bullish CHoCH in discount — Higher probability (HL has formed)
birth: schematic: CHoCH in discount after HL = higher-probability long
notes: teaching point: discount CHoCH is the valid entry; schematic

geom: small semicircle arcs drawn at swing high (top) and swing low (bottom-left)
birth: schematic: minor liquidity-grab arcs at the range extremes
notes: low-confidence faint hand arcs at extremes (sweep/UTAD+spring style); schematic, logged not dropped

label: Premium zone
birth: schematic: fib range on a down leg, premium above 0.5, discount below
notes: Writo-Finance ICT guide; real candlesticks but no instrument/stock — generic educational chart

geom: line BOS ~81.4 (break of prior swing low)
label: BOS
birth: schematic: bearish break of structure anchoring the fib range
notes: BOS defines the dealing range; schematic

geom: pivot 83.76
birth: schematic: swing high anchor of fib
notes: upper fib anchor; schematic

geom: pivot 79.23
birth: schematic: swing low anchor of fib
notes: lower fib anchor; schematic

geom: blue box at Higher-Low/Lower-High zone (left diagram), between 'Break' labels
label: Breaker Block
birth: schematic: failed OB flipped after opposing BOS (Break) — HH>...>LL sequence
notes: blanet 'Breaker Block vs Mitigation Block'; left panel; structure broke (breaker)

geom: blue box at Higher-Low zone (right diagram); 'No Break' at HH, 'Break' below
label: Mitigation Block
birth: schematic: OB retested WITHOUT taking prior high ('No Break') — mitigation not breaker
notes: right panel; key contrast = No-Break distinguishes mitigation from breaker

geom: dashed 'Break' levels through the HL/LH on left diagram
label: Break
birth: schematic: structure break that flips OB to breaker
notes: HH/HL/High/Low/LL/LH labels annotate the swing sequence; schematic

geom: dashed 'No Break' at HH + 'Break' below on right diagram
label: No Break / Break
birth: schematic: prior high not broken => mitigation block
notes: the No-Break annotation is the discriminator; schematic

geom: box near swing high B ~2310; leader line labels 'Bearish Mitigation Block'
label: Bearish Mitigation Block
birth: schematic on real candles: down-candle OB before B, retested on B-C rally without breaking, then markdown
notes: TradingView ICT mitigation example; price axis ~2310.40 (likely gold, unconfirmed) — no stock symbol

geom: 'mSS' label at A->B break line ~mid
label: mSS
birth: schematic: minor market-structure shift up before the trap
notes: minor structure shift; schematic

geom: purple 'Failure to Swing' annotation near prior high left of B
label: Failure to Swing
birth: schematic: prior high not exceeded (SMS failure) preceding mitigation
notes: failure-to-swing = liquidity left behind; schematic

geom: labeled point A, swing low left of impulse
label: A
birth: schematic: origin swing low
notes: A-B-C pivots; schematic

geom: labeled point B, swing high ~2310
label: B
birth: schematic: swing high where mitigation completes
notes: B is the reaction high; schematic

geom: labeled point C, swing low after B
label: C
birth: schematic: lower low confirming markdown
notes: C confirms the down leg; schematic

geom: yellow box at bottom with yellow highlight on the rejection candle above SSS
label: Rejection Block
birth: schematic: long-wick candle rejecting below sellside, then MSS up
notes: rejection block = wick-based demand OB variant; no canonical 'rejection_block' vocab, mapped to order_block; schematic

geom: red horizontal line at swing lows (sell-side liquidity)
label: SSS
birth: schematic: sellstops swept before reversal
notes: sellside liquidity level; schematic

geom: highlighted candle dips below SSS then closes back up (arrow points to grab)
birth: schematic: liquidity grab below SSS creating the rejection block
notes: sweep that births the rejection block; schematic

geom: 'MSS' label above, break of minor structure after rejection
label: MSS
birth: schematic: market-structure shift up confirming the long
notes: MSS confirms reversal; schematic

geom: yellow/olive box across top; based on 'Highest open/closed candle' body top
label: Rejection Block / Highest open/closed candle
birth: schematic: rejection block drawn to highest open-or-close (body) of the wick-rejection candle
notes: defines rejection block by highest OPEN/CLOSE (body, not wick); schematic; maps to order_block

geom: red line labeled SSS upper-left
label: SSS
birth: schematic: sellside liquidity reference
notes: sellside level; schematic

geom: 'MSS' label left-mid marking structure shift down
label: MSS
birth: schematic: bearish market-structure shift under the rejection block
notes: MSS down; schematic

geom: green box sitting on TOP portion of the parent bullish OB; 'Traded into Bullish OB'
label: Propulsion Block / Traded into Bullish OB
birth: schematic: propulsion block forms inside/atop the parent bullish OB and launches the up-move
notes: parent-linked: propulsion nested on bullish OB; schematic

geom: large orange box below the propulsion block
label: Bullish Order Block
birth: schematic: demand OB = last down-candle body before the up impulse
notes: parent OB hosting the propulsion block; schematic

geom: red box on lower/inner portion of the parent bearish OB; 'Traded into Bearish OB'
label: Propulsion Block / Traded into Bearish OB
birth: schematic: propulsion block forms inside the parent bearish OB and drives the down-move
notes: parent-linked: propulsion nested on bearish OB; green shading = markdown target; schematic

geom: orange box across top labeled Bearish OB
label: Bearish OB
birth: schematic: supply OB = last up-candle body before the down impulse
notes: parent OB hosting the propulsion block; schematic

geom: 3 zones: Accumulation (yellow, saw-tooth range) -> Manipulation (pink, dip below) -> Distribution (green, rally up/out)
label: Accumulation / Manipulation / Distribution
birth: schematic: AMD / smart-money cycle; manipulation sweeps accumulation low then distributes higher
notes: bullish AMD cycle teaching diagram; no stock/prices

geom: single daily candle mapped: Open/High/Low/Close; Accumulation (cyan) near open, Manipulation (red) dips below open to Low, Distribution (green) rallies to High/Close
label: BULLISH P03 — Accumulation / Manipulation / Distribution / Open High Low Close
birth: schematic: Power-of-3 = one candle's internal AMD delivery
notes: @brodietrades bullish PO3; ties candle OHLC to AMD; no stock

geom: left example: Accumulation (cyan box ~160k) -> Manipulation (red dip ~156-157k) -> Distribution (green rally to ~167k)
label: Accumulation / Manipulation / Distribution
birth: schematic: bullish Power-of-3; manipulation sweeps accumulation low then markup
notes: 'Mastering the ICT Power of 3'; left/bullish; price axis 154k-171k, no instrument

geom: right example: Accumulation (cyan box ~164k) -> Manipulation (green pop ~166-167k) -> Distribution (red selloff to ~156k)
label: Accumulation / Manipulation / Distribution
birth: schematic: bearish Power-of-3; manipulation runs buystops above accumulation then markdown
notes: right/bearish PO3 mirror; price axis 154k-171k, no instrument
